title: polypodium longissimum
intro: Polypodium longissimum, also known as the rattlesnake fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Polypodium longissimum can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and have been used to treat a variety of health issues, including arthritis and eczema.
